processSteps.title: Send the Spec
processSteps.description: Share the equipment type, required size, service conditions, location needs, and timing.

processSteps.title: Check the Network
processSteps.description: Petra reviews active sellers, regional surplus, operator relationships, and quiet-market availability.

processSteps.title: Verify Fit
processSteps.description: We compare condition, documents, field use, logistics, and practical buyer requirements before presenting options.

processSteps.title: Move the Deal
processSteps.description: When a fit is real, Petra supports buyer questions, seller coordination, negotiation, and next-step logistics.

requirements: And someone who actually knows where to find it

buyerBenefits.title: Specific Asset Sourcing
buyerBenefits.description: Petra is built for buyers who need a real fit, not a long list of irrelevant public listings.

buyerBenefits.title: Quiet-Market Access
buyerBenefits.description: Some equipment moves through operator relationships and regional sellers before it ever reaches an open marketplace.

buyerBenefits.title: Practical Verification
buyerBenefits.description: We focus on condition, specs, documentation, site fit, and logistics before a buyer wastes time.

faqs.question: Can Petra source equipment that is not listed publicly?
faqs.answer: Yes. Petra can review buyer requirements against active sellers, regional surplus, operator relationships, and quiet-market opportunities.

faqs.question: What information should a buyer provide?
faqs.answer: The most useful details are equipment type, required specs, location needs, condition requirements, timing, budget range, and documentation needs.

faqs.question: Does Petra only work in oilfield equipment?
faqs.answer: Petra focuses on used oilfield and industrial equipment, including compressors, separators, pump packages, tank batteries, production equipment, and related surplus assets.
